name: Chocolate Potato Cake with Cream Cheese Frosting
recipeInstructions:
Cake: Preheat oven to 350°F. Beat butter and sugar until creamy. Add egg yolks one at a time, alternating with hot mashed potatoes, and mix well. In a separate bowl, sift together flour, baking powder, salt, and cocoa. Gradually add this dry mixture to the butter mixture, alternately with milk, mixing gently after each addition. Whisk egg whites until stiff peaks form. Gently fold the egg whites into the batter. Divide the batter evenly between two greased and lightly floured 9-inch round cake pans. Bake for 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Remove from pans and let cool on wire racks for 5 minutes before turning cakes out onto cooling racks. Frosting: In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth. Beat in vanilla and butter until well combined. Gradually add powdered sugar, mixing until spreading is easy. Spread frosting over the top of one cake layer, then place the second layer on top and frost the entire cake.
THE DESSERT SHOW #DS3032 AIR DATE: 1/26/96
